title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content:
Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include:
- Art exhibitions
- Museum entries
- Music concerts
- Film screenings and more

Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app).

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation."

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

title: How to Handle Login Issues?
content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

title: How to Reset Your Password
content:
Password reset is a simple process:

- Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Enter your registered email address
- Check your email (including spam folder) for a reset link
- Click the link and create a new password
- Use your new password to log in

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Click 'Forgot Password', enter your email, and check for a reset link. Create a new password and you'll be able to log in immediately."

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
content:
Enhance your account security:

- Go to Account Settings > Security
- Enable Two-Factor Authentication
- Choose SMS or authenticator app
- Confirm the setup with a verification code
- Save your backup codes in a safe place

**Suggested phrasing:**
"For added security, enable two-factor authentication in your account settings. You can use SMS or an authenticator app to verify your login."

title: Email Verification Process
content:
Verify your email to access full account features:

- Check your inbox for a verification email
- Click the verification link within the email
- If you don't see it, check spam or request a new verification email
- Your account will be fully activated once verified

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Please check your email for a verification link. Click it to activate your account. If you don't see it, check spam or we can resend it."

title: How to Update Your Profile Information
content:
Keep your CultPass profile current:

- Open the CultPass app
- Go to 'My Account' > 'Profile'
- Edit your name, email, phone number, or preferences
- Save changes by tapping 'Update'
- Changes take effect immediately

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can update your profile information anytime in the 'My Account' section. Simply edit your details and tap 'Update' to save."

title: Understanding Premium Experiences
content:
Some CultPass experiences are marked as premium:

- Premium experiences may cost extra beyond your standard subscription
- The additional cost is clearly shown before you reserve
- You can choose to pay or select a different standard experience
- Premium experiences often offer exclusive access or extended hours

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Premium experiences offer exclusive access and may have an additional cost shown during booking. It's your choice whether to upgrade for that experience."

title: How to Find Experiences in Your Location
content:
Discover local cultural events:

- Open the CultPass app and tap 'Explore'
- Use the location filter to set your city or region
- Browse available experiences near you
- Check dates and times to find what works for you

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Use the location filter in the Explore section to find cultural experiences in your area. You can filter by city, date, or event type."

title: What Happens When You Exceed Your Monthly Limit?
content:
CultPass includes 4 experiences per month:

- Once you've reserved 4 experiences, no more standard reservations are allowed
- You can still reserve premium experiences by paying the additional fee
- Your monthly limit resets on the first day of each calendar month
- Unused experiences do NOT roll over to the next month

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your subscription includes 4 experiences per month. Once you've used them, you can still access premium experiences for an extra fee. Your limit resets on the first of each month."

title: How to Cancel a Reservation
content:
Cancel your reserved experience:

- Open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'
- Find the experience you want to cancel
- Tap 'Cancel Reservation'
- Confirm the cancellation
- Your monthly experience count will be restored

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Go to 'My Reservations' in the app, find your event, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Your spot will be freed up immediately."

title: Early Cancellation Policy
content:
You can cancel reservations with ease:

- Cancel anytime before the event starts
- Cancellations made 24+ hours before the event restore your monthly credit
- Cancellations made within 24 hours may forfeit the experience
- Premium experience fees are non-refundable

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Cancel at least 24 hours before your event to restore your monthly credit. Same-day cancellations may not be refundable."

title: How to View Your Reservation History
content:
Check your past and upcoming reservations:

- Open the CultPass app
- Tap 'My Reservations'
- View all your upcoming events
- Scroll down to see past experiences
- Each listing shows date, time, location, and your QR code

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your reservation history is available in 'My Reservations'. You can see upcoming events and past experiences you've attended."

title: How to Transfer a Reservation
content:
Change who attends your reserved experience:

- Go to 'My Reservations' in the CultPass app
- Select the event you want to transfer
- Tap 'Transfer to Friend'
- Enter your friend's CultPass username or email
- Your friend will receive a notification to accept

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can transfer a reservation to a friend through 'My Reservations'. Enter their CultPass email and they'll be notified to accept the transfer."

title: Accessibility Features and Accommodations
content:
CultPass is designed for everyone:

- Many experiences offer wheelchair access and accessible parking
- Check the 'Accessibility' tab when viewing experience details
- Request special accommodations when reserving (note added to your booking)
- Contact support for additional accessibility questions

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Most experiences have accessibility features. Check the accessibility details when browsing, and let us know if you need special accommodations."

title: How to Add a Guest to Your Reservation
content:
Bring someone with you to an experience:

- During reservation, you can select the number of guests
- Each guest requires their own CultPass account or a guest pass
- Guest passes can be purchased at a reduced rate
- Confirm the total cost before finalizing your reservation

**Suggested phrasing:**
"When reserving, you can add guests to your booking. Each guest needs a CultPass account or a guest pass, which shows the cost upfront."

title: Understanding Experience Ratings and Reviews
content:
Learn from other attendees:

- Each experience has ratings and reviews from past participants
- Ratings are based on venue, guide quality, and overall experience
- Read reviews to understand what to expect
- After attending, you can leave your own review

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Check the ratings and reviews for each experience to see what others thought. You can also leave your own review after attending an event."

title: How to Report a Problem with an Event
content:
If something goes wrong:

- Contact CultPass support immediately with event details
- Describe the issue (cancelled, cancelled, late start, etc.)
- Provide your reservation confirmation number
- Support will investigate and may offer a refund or credit

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If you experience an issue with an event, contact us with your confirmation number and details. We'll investigate and make it right."

title: How to Refer a Friend to CultPass
content:
Share the cultural experience with friends:

- Open CultPass and go to 'Refer a Friend'
- Share your unique referral code with friends
- When they sign up using your code, you both get a bonus experience
- No limit to how many friends you can refer

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Share your referral code with friends. When they sign up, you both get a bonus cultural experience!"

title: Understanding Billing and Payment Methods
content:
Manage your subscription payments:

- CultPass accepts credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets
- Your subscription renews automatically each month
- View billing history in 'My Account' > 'Billing'
- Update payment methods anytime
- We never share your payment information

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can manage your payment methods and view billing history in your account settings. We accept all major credit and debit cards."

title: What to Do If Your Card is Declined
content:
Troubleshoot payment issues:

- Check that your card has sufficient funds
- Verify the card details match your billing address
- Try a different payment method
- Contact your bank to ensure the card isn't blocked
- Reach out to CultPass support if the issue persists

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If your card is declined, verify the details are correct and check your account balance. Try a different payment method or contact your bank."

title: How to Pause Your Subscription Temporarily
content:
Take a break without losing your account:

- Go to 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'
- Select 'Pause Subscription'
- Choose how long you want to pause (1-3 months)
- Your account data is preserved
- Restart anytime by selecting 'Resume'

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Pause your subscription for 1-3 months without losing your account. Your data is preserved and you can resume anytime."

title: Permanent Account Deletion Process
content:
Delete your CultPass account permanently:

- Go to 'My Account' > 'Account Settings'
- Scroll to the bottom and tap 'Delete Account'
- Review the warning about permanent deletion
- Confirm by entering your password
- Your data will be removed within 30 days

**Suggested phrasing:**
"To delete your account permanently, go to Account Settings and tap 'Delete Account'. This action cannot be undone."

title: How to Unsubscribe from Email Notifications
content:
Manage your notification preferences:

- Open the CultPass app and go to 'Settings'
- Tap 'Notifications'
- Toggle off notifications you don't want
- Choose frequency (daily, weekly, or never)
- Changes take effect immediately

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can manage your notification preferences in Settings. Turn them off or choose how often you want to receive updates."

title: What Does Your CultPass Subscription Cost?
content:
Transparent pricing for cultural access:

- Standard CultPass: $19.99/month for 4 experiences
- Family Plan: $34.99/month for 2 accounts and 6 experiences
- Student Discount: $9.99/month (with valid student ID)
- First month is 50% off for new users
- Cancel anytime with no penalties

**Suggested phrasing:**
"CultPass is $19.99/month for 4 experiences, or $34.99/month for our family plan. Students get a 50% discount on their first month!"

title: How to Claim Your Student Discount
content:
Save 50% with a valid student ID:

- Sign up for a CultPass account
- Go to 'My Account' > 'Discounts'
- Upload a photo of your student ID
- CultPass will verify and apply the discount
- Your monthly rate becomes $9.99

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If you're a student, upload your student ID in the Discounts section to get 50% off your subscription. We'll verify it and apply the discount immediately."

title: Family Plan Benefits and Management
content:
Share CultPass with family members:

- Family Plan includes 2 accounts and 6 monthly experiences
- Add or remove family members from 'My Account' > 'Family'
- Each member has their own login and reservation history
- Share the cost and experiences with loved ones
- $34.99/month for the entire family

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Our Family Plan gives you 2 accounts and 6 experiences/month for $34.99. You can manage family members in your account settings."

title: How to Upgrade Your Subscription Plan
content:
Get more experiences:

- Go to 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'
- View available upgrade options
- Select the plan you want (Family, Premium, etc.)
- The new rate takes effect on your next billing cycle
- You can upgrade anytime

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Upgrade your plan anytime in 'My Account'. The new rate takes effect on your next billing date."

title: Downgrading Your CultPass Plan
content:
Reduce your subscription level:

- Go to 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'
- Select a lower tier plan
- The new rate takes effect at your next renewal
- You won't lose any current reservations
- Unused experiences in the current month do NOT transfer

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Downgrade to a lower plan anytime. The change takes effect at your next renewal, and you keep all current reservations."

title: How to Check Your Account Balance and Credits
content:
Track your remaining experiences:

- Open CultPass and go to 'My Account'
- You'll see your remaining monthly experiences at the top
- Check 'Reservations' to see which experiences you've used
- Unused credits do NOT carry over to the next month

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your remaining experiences are shown at the top of your account page. Remember, unused credits reset at the start of each month."

title: Experience Notifications and Reminders
content:
Never miss an event:

- CultPass sends reminders 24 hours before your experience
- Reminders are sent 1 hour before as well
- Check 'Settings' > 'Notifications' to customize frequency
- Disable reminders if you prefer to remember on your own

**Suggested phrasing:**
"We send you reminders 24 hours and 1 hour before your event. You can customize or disable these in your notification settings."

title: How to Download Your QR Code
content:
Prepare for your experience:

- Go to 'My Reservations'
- Select the upcoming event
- Tap 'Download QR Code' or take a screenshot
- Save it to your phone for easy access
- Show the QR code when you arrive at the venue

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can download your QR code from 'My Reservations'. Save it to your phone and show it when you arrive at the event."

title: Checking In to Your Experience
content:
Arrive and check in easily:

- Arrive at least 15 minutes early
- Have your QR code ready (phone or printed)
- Show the code to the venue staff
- They'll scan it and confirm your attendance
- You're all set to enjoy the experience!

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready. The staff will scan it and you're good to go!"

title: What If You Arrive Late to an Event?
content:
Late arrival policy:

- Arrive as early as possible if you're running late
- Events may begin without latecomers
- Contact the venue directly if you're significantly delayed
- CultPass cannot guarantee entry if the event has started
- Your experience credit remains even if you miss the event

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try to arrive on time so you don't miss the start. If you're running late, contact the venue directly. We recommend arriving at least 15 minutes early."

title: Rescheduling Your Reservation
content:
Change your event date:

- Go to 'My Reservations' and select the event
- Tap 'Change Date'
- Browse available dates and times for the same experience
- Select a new time slot
- Confirm the change (no additional fee)

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reschedule your event to a different date by selecting 'Change Date' in your reservations. Look for available times and confirm."

title: No-Show Policy and Consequences
content:
Attendance expectations:

- If you don't attend your reserved experience, it counts as used
- Multiple no-shows may result in account restrictions
- Always cancel if you can't attend (restores your credit)
- For genuine emergencies, contact support within 24 hours

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Please cancel your reservation if you can't attend. No-shows count as used experiences. Contact us for emergencies within 24 hours."

title: How to Contact CultPass Support
content:
Get help when you need it:

- Email: support@cultpass.com
- Phone: 1-800-CULTPASS (1-800-285-8727)
- In-app chat: Available 24/7
- Response time: Usually within 2-4 hours
- Our team is ready to help

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Contact our support team via email, phone, or in-app chat. We're here 24/7 and typically respond within 2-4 hours."

title: Filing a Complaint or Feedback
content:
We value your input:

- Use the 'Send Feedback' button in the app
- Describe your experience and suggestions
- Attach photos or details if relevant
- Our team reviews all feedback
- You may receive follow-up from management

**Suggested phrasing:**
"We'd love your feedback! Use the 'Send Feedback' button to share your experience and suggestions. Our team reads everything."

title: Privacy and Data Protection
content:
Your data is safe with us:

- CultPass uses encryption to protect your information
- We never sell your data to third parties
- Your payment info is handled by secure payment processors
- Review our Privacy Policy in 'Settings' > 'Legal'
- You can request data deletion anytime

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your privacy is our priority. We use encryption and never sell your data. Check our Privacy Policy in Settings for details."

title: Understanding Terms of Service
content:
Know your rights and responsibilities:

- Review our Terms of Service before subscribing
- Terms cover usage rights, cancellation, and dispute resolution
- We update terms occasionally (you'll be notified)
- By using CultPass, you agree to the terms
- Questions? Contact support@cultpass.com

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Our Terms of Service outline your rights and our responsibilities. Read them in Settings > Legal, and contact us if you have questions."

title: Gift Card and Voucher Information
content:
Give the gift of culture:

- CultPass gift cards are available online and at retailers
- Denominations: $25, $50, $100, $200
- Recipients can use gift cards to pay for subscriptions
- No expiration date on gift cards
- Redeem in 'My Account' > 'Gift Cards'

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Give the gift of culture with a CultPass gift card! Available in various denominations with no expiration date."

title: Corporate and Group Plans
content:
Special pricing for organizations:

- Bulk subscriptions for 10+ employees
- Custom plans tailored to your needs
- Special corporate rates available
- Contact: corporate@cultpass.com
- Dedicated account manager included

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Interested in CultPass for your organization? Contact our corporate team at corporate@cultpass.com for custom group rates."

title: Browser Compatibility and Technical Requirements
content:
Ensure smooth access:

- CultPass works on all modern browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge)
- Mobile apps available for iOS and Android
- Minimum internet speed: 2 Mbps recommended
- JavaScript must be enabled
- Clear your browser cache if experiencing issues

**Suggested phrasing:**
"CultPass works on all modern browsers and mobile devices. Make sure you have JavaScript enabled and a stable internet connection."

title: App Download and Installation Guide
content:
Get CultPass on your device:

- iPhone: Search 'CultPass' in the App Store
- Android: Find 'CultPass' on Google Play
- Install the app and sign in with your account
- Grant necessary permissions (location, notifications)
- Keep the app updated for best experience

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Download the CultPass app from the App Store or Google Play. Sign in, grant permissions, and start exploring!"

title: Troubleshooting App Crashes
content:
Fix app stability issues:

- Restart your phone
- Close other apps running in background
- Update the CultPass app to the latest version
- Clear the app cache (Settings > Apps > CultPass)
- Reinstall the app if problems persist
- Contact support if crashes continue

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If the app is crashing, try restarting your phone and updating to the latest version. Clear the cache and reinstall if needed."

title: How to Report a Bug or Technical Issue
content:
Help us improve:

- Use the 'Report Bug' feature in the app settings
- Describe the issue in detail
- Include your device type and app version
- Attach screenshots if possible
- Our tech team will investigate

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Found a bug? Use the 'Report Bug' feature with details and screenshots. Our tech team will look into it right away."

title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
content:
Quick answers to common questions:

- How many experiences do I get? 4 per month
- Can I cancel anytime? Yes, no penalties
- Do unused experiences roll over? No, they reset each month
- What payment methods are accepted? All major cards
- Is my data safe? Yes, fully encrypted

For more FAQs, visit our website or contact support.
